description.value: Aura strong (no school); CL 17th; Weight 5 lbs. Price varies by specific type: Lesser enlarge metamagic rod 3,000 gp Enlarge metamagic rod 11,000 gp Greater enlarge metamagic rod 24,500 gp DESCRIPTION The wielder can cast up to three spells per day that are enlarged as though using the Enlarge Spell feat. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Rod, Enlarge Spell Cost varies by specific type: Lesser enlarge metamagic rod 1,500 gp Enlarge metamagic rod 5,500 gp Greater enlarge metamagic rod 12,250 gp
